reasoning: A futuristic 'Quant' ecosystem implies precision, math, and high-performance engineering. We bypass generic neon clichés and instead use a stark, high-contrast Swiss dark mode. Pure layered blacks, ultra-crisp typography, and stark white or electric blue accents ensure a highly polished, elite mobile-first experience.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, edge-to-edge content for feeds and reels. Strict structural grids for profile. Generous spacing in the AI workspace.
layout_and_spacing.container_max_width: max-w-md mx-auto relative h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden bg-[#050505] shadow-2xl border-x border-border/20 md:rounded-3xl md:h-[90vh] md:my-8

navigation.style: Bottom tab bar for mobile. Glassmorphism backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-t border-white/5. Fixed to bottom. Safe area padding.
navigation.icons: lucide-react, 24px, 1px stroke for active, 0.5px for inactive

feed.structure: Edge-to-edge images/videos. No horizontal padding on media. Header (Avatar + Username + 'More' icon) with p-4. Action bar (Like, Comment, Share) below media with p-4. Typography uses Manrope text-sm for captions.
feed.microinteractions: Double tap to like (soft scale animation + heart icon overlay). Soft glow on action buttons.

spotlight_reels.structure: 100vh container, snap-y snap-mandatory scroll. Each reel takes h-[100dvh] w-full. Absolute positioned UI elements.
spotlight_reels.ui_overlay: Right-side vertical action stack (Like, Comment, Share, Audio track). Bottom-left for User info and caption. Top gradient overlay for safe area.
spotlight_reels.gestures: Swipe up/down to next reel. Tap to pause/play.

quant_ai.trigger: Floating draggable widget (Framer Motion drag). Uses Neumorphic/Glass button style with a glowing border (tracing beam effect).
quant_ai.workspace: Expands into a sleek chat interface. Terminal-inspired retro-futurism (black bg, stark white/blue text). Markdown support, floating input bar at the bottom with backdrop-blur.

profile.structure: Bento grid layout. Top: Avatar (large, subtle outer glow ring for 'active story'), Stats (Posts, Followers, Following) in a horizontal flex. Bio in JetBrains Mono text-xs for a 'Quant' hacker vibe.
profile.bento_cards: Grid-cols-3 for post thumbnails. Gap-1. No borders on thumbnails to simulate a tight gallery.

channels_broadcast.structure: List view. Avatar + Title + Last message. Unread indicator as a glowing electric blue dot. Swipe left on row to reveal 'Mute/Leave' actions.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion. Initial opacity 0, y 10. Animate to opacity 1, y 0. Exit opacity 0, y -10.

image_urls.description: Cyberpunk neon city lifestyle for feed posts
Vertical immersive city shot for Reels
Striking cyberpunk portrait for user profile
Another cyberpunk portrait for feed user

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first layout. Use max-w-md mx-auto to restrict the app to mobile width on desktop, centering it like an APK emulator.
Implement bottom tab navigation (Home/Feed, Search, Spotlight/Reels, Profile).
Feed must be an exact IG clone: Avatar/Name top, edge-to-edge image middle, Action bar + Captions bottom.
Spotlight must use standard CSS scroll snapping (snap-y snap-mandatory) on a 100dvh container. Overlay icons on the right side.
Quant AI must have a floating action button (draggable using framer-motion) available on all screens except when Spotlight or AI workspace is active.
The AI Workspace should look terminal-esque but highly polished (glassmorphism input).
Profile should use a bento grid for stats and a dense 3-column grid (gap-1) for posts.
Use JetBrains Mono for small data points/stats to enforce the 'Quant' brand.
Do NOT use purple or teal anywhere. Rely on stark white, deep black, electric blue (#2563EB), and warning yellow (#FACC15).
